text: Bhai ko property mein zyada hissa mila taaki wo bahar jaakar padh sake, aur mujhe unki dekh-bhal aur ghar ke kaamo mein laga diya gaya hai. Main thak chuki hoon padhai aur ghar ki zimmedari saath nibhate huye, par main ruk nahi sakti kyunki mujhe bhai ka bhavishya banana hai. Mera thakna ek option nahi hai, mujhe bas chalte rehna hai.

Property batwara mein bhai ko sab mil gaya taaki uski shadi ki 'izzat' bani rahe, aur mujhe bola gaya hai ki main masters ke saath-saath rishta bhi dekhun. Main itni exhaust ho chuki hoon ki dimaag kaam nahi kar raha, par parivaar ka bojh mere hi kandhon par hai. Mujhe pata hai ki main afford nahi kar sakti ki main gir jaun ya shikayat karun.

Papa ne saara paisa bhai ke business mein laga diya aur mujhe ghar ki chardiwari mein reh kar sab sambhalne ko kaha hai. Main exhaustion ki hadd paar kar chuki hoon, par bade hone ka farz hai ki main sab seh kar bhi muskurati rahun. Mujhe apne goals kurban karne honge taaki chote bhai ko koi takleef na ho, yahi mera dharm hai.

Bhai ko property milne par 'log kya kahenge' ki chinta mein main chup hoon aur din-raat ghar aur college ke beech pis rahi hoon. Main itni thaki hui hoon ki aankhein band ho rahi hain, par mujhe chote bhai ki coaching fees ke liye tuition padhana hi padega. Main ruk nahi sakti, mera endurance hi is parivaar ki akeli umeed hai.

Restricted mobility ke bawajood main ghar ke saare bade faisle aur kaam handle kar rahi hoon kyunki bhai ko property sambhalne ki azadi mili hai. Main mentally aur physically toot chuki hoon, par 'cannot afford to stop' wali feeling mujhe har subah utha deti hai. Meri kurbani hi bhai ka rasta saaf karegi, isliye mujhe ye duty bina sawaal kiye nibhani hai.
